headline: Is GE Aerospace Stock Worth Buying Ahead of Q2 Earnings Release?
summary: GE heads into Q2 earnings with strong aerospace demand, upbeat estimates and solid momentum, but can its premium valuation hold up?

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Howmet Aerospace, Raises Price Target to $320
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Gautam Khanna   maintains Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) with a Buy and raises the price target from $300 to $320.
